# Copilot Timetable AI Project

This folder contains a workspace for the AI-Based Timetable Generation System, scaffolded by GitHub Copilot.

## Project Information

The project is a FastAPI + MongoDB backend for an AI-Based Timetable Generation System aligned with NEP 2020 for multidisciplinary FYUP, B.Ed, M.Ed, and ITEP programs.

### Key Features:

- Flexible, credit-based, multidisciplinary course scheduling
- Support for teaching practice and field work blocks
- Faculty workload balancing
- Room assignment optimization
- Constraint-based timetable generation
- Export to various formats (Excel, PDF)

## Project setup completed successfully
